name: names_pipeline

name: ranking_names
notes: External KRW dump contains grade paths and lambda 0.25 two-grade target.

name: names_npmle

name: names_npmle_and_ranking
notes: Producing names rows requires porting the names-specific NPMLE/deconvolution/ranking workflow rather than reusing the current race/gender firm monolith.
